name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Why is this needed?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Scope note

Is this in scope for this single-tenant, self-hosted, no-servers project? (See
`README.md` / `CLAUDE.md` for the project's architecture constraints — no
hosted APIs, no multi-tenant features.)

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
